sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) foreskin, ἀκροβυστία. (Arabic غُرْلَةُ) 1Sa 18:25. 2Sa 3:14, בְּשַׂר הָֽעָרְלָה membrum præputiatum, Gen 17:11, 24 Gen 17:24 Levit. 12:3 . Metaph. עָרְלַת־לֵב the foreskin of the heart, see above, Deu 10:16 Jer 4:4 (compare Kor. Sur. ii. 82; iv. 154).

(2) foreskin of a tree, i.e. the fruit of the first three years, which according to the law was accounted unclean, Levit. 19:23 . Compare the root No. 2.-Pl. עֲרָלֹות pr.n. (hill) of foreskins, near Gilgal, Jos 5:3.

I.
